name: trove
description: Trove Coding workflow framework. Provides /trove:init (bootstrap; auto-seeds canonical files from existing project evidence when applicable), /trove:session (begin a fresh session), and /trove:save (update meta after work). Auto-loads the three canonical files plus plans/ at session start, resume, and after compaction via SessionStart hook; decisions/ and topics/ are read on demand (no-op in projects without a trove/ directory).
